title: From Discrete Null-Lattice Growth to so(8):Concrete Realization and Exact Lie Closure
description: Complete reproducibility package for the preprint 'From Discrete Null-Lattice Growth to so(8): Concrete Realization and Exact Lie Closure'. Contains machine-checked Lean 4 proofs (G₂ antisymmetry, full so(8) Lie closure), exact rational symbolic certificates over ℚ, generator scripts, LaTeX sources, and both manuscript + appendix PDFs. All nontrivial steps are formally verified.
notes: Update creators, description, related identifiers, and versioning before publication.
